nodes.label: ADR 0006: Tailwind for the production app, not the mockups' design-system.css
nodes.rationale: The ui/ mockups ship a hand-rolled design-system.css themed after the Family Design System. Rather than importing it wholesale into the production Next.js app, the app is styled with Tailwind CSS v4: Family design tokens declared once in the Tailwind @theme block, mockup visual vocabulary (app shell, tables, KPI cards, badges, pill buttons) rebuilt as shared React components using Tailwind utilities. Consequence: design-system.css remains source of truth for mockups only; a palette change must be applied in both places while mockups are still referenced.

edges.source_location: 'themed after the Family Design System (Design System/ folder)'
Both encode the same token set (brand-600 #7c3aed, radius-sm/md/lg 4/6/10px) later declared once in the Tailwind @theme block
